## PiProcessConfig.agentDir property

Optional override for Pi's agent directory.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly agentDir?: string;
```

## Remarks

When set, `pi-ws` injects `PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR` into the spawned Pi process environment. This is the easiest way to ship custom prompts, extensions, skills, themes, and model configuration with your app.
